definition:
1. the hearth, fire-place , (Homer); the sanctuary of suppliants, καθέζετο ἐπ᾽ ἐσχάρῃ ἐν κονίῃσιν (Odyssey by Homer):—; a pan of coals, a brasier , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. πυρὸς ἐσχάραι the watch-fires  of the camp, (Iliad by Homer) 
3. an altar for burnt-offerings , (Odyssey by Homer) (ML)
